title: Happy Farm Friends
description: A cheerful farm scene coloring page featuring friendly farm animals and a classic red barn. This coloring activity helps children learn about farm animals while developing fine motor skills and creativity.
instructions: Color the farm animals and barn using crayons or colored pencils. Try to use realistic colors or be creative with your own color choices!

content.image: A sunny farm scene with a red barn in the background, a spotted cow grazing in a field, a pink pig playing in mud, and a yellow chicken pecking at seeds near a fence.
learningFacts: Cows give us milk that we can drink or use to make cheese
Pigs are very smart animals and like to play in mud to stay cool
Chickens lay eggs that we can eat for breakfast
Barns are special buildings on farms where animals can stay warm and dry
